Home → Demo Hub → Runtime Group

MVP-57 controlled runtime group

500-Agent Runtime Group

Activate, deactivate, heartbeat, and monitor a controlled 500-agent supervised runtime group across 50 lanes. No command execution.

MVP-57 500-Agent Runtime Group Runtime group size: 500 Live runtime agents enabled: 0–500 Total registered agents: 47,979 Activation beyond 500: blocked Full 47,979 activation: blocked

Kill switch

Visible and ready

Mass activation remains blocked. The group can only operate inside the approved 500-agent boundary across 50 lanes.

Kill switch visible No activate all route

Loading backend state...

Backend Status Panel

Group readiness and runtime config

Backend functions and Supabase persistence are required for live state. When missing, the page stays readable and explicitly says so.

Backend Status

  • ConnectionLoading...
  • Runtime activationfalse
  • Runtime group size500
  • Live runtime agents enabled0 of 500
  • Max batch size500
  • Active lanes0 of 50
  • Inactive lanes50 of 50
  • Group healthinactive
  • Heartbeat count0
  • Readiness note count0
  • Total registered agents47,979
  • Kill switchvisible

Group Rollup

Loading group rollup...

Group health rollups, lane health, heartbeat counts, readiness note counts, and audit counts are all reflected from the backend response.

Backend functions or Supabase environment variables are not configured yet. The UI is ready, but persistence requires Supabase URL and service-role key configured in Netlify environment variables.

Runtime Controls

Activate group, lanes, and individual agents

Approval and heartbeat controls are persisted server-side. No command execution, deploy execution, rollback execution, or alert sending is enabled.

Lane and Agent Picker

Select a lane to inspect its health.

Lane metrics will appear here.

Select an agent to inspect its status.

Lane-scoped, supervised, audit-only, readiness-note only.

Activation Controls

Heartbeats update persisted runtime state.

Lane Roster

Twenty-five lanes with ten agents each

Each lane remains supervised, lane-scoped, and capped at ten approved agents.

Lane health, Heartbeat count, and Readiness note count are tracked for every lane.

Audit Timeline

Activation, lane changes, heartbeat, and readiness notes

No audit events have been recorded yet.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

The two-hundred-fifty-agent runtime group is supervised, audit-only, and capped at two hundred fifty agents across twenty-five lanes. It does not enable command execution, deploy execution, rollback execution, alert sending, or full-squad mass activation.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
